description: Letter from Isma’il b. Barhun al-Taharti probably from al-Mahdiyya, to Yosef b. Ya’aqov b. ʿAwkal from Fustat. Dating: August 3, 1011. The writer expected to receive a confirmation for receiving 150 dinars that he sent to Fustat to Ibn ʿAwkal, but he did not get it. It seems from the letter that the security situation was not good, especially because of the dangerous of attacks in the sea by Byzantines. The last part of the letter mentions money to the Yeshivas. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #122) VMR
description_he: מכתב מישמעאל בן ברהון אל-טאהרתי, כנראה מאל-מהדייה, ליוסף בן יעקב בן עוקאל, פוסטאט, 3 באוגוסט 1011, על 150 דינרים ומסחר
